name: Fig and Raisin Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup diced figs (soak 1 hour in warm water if dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and baking powder together.
2. Prepare the figs and raisins by soaking them for one hour in warm water if they are dried.
3. Soak breadcrumbs in milk for one hour.
4. Stir eggs, cooking oil, and flour mixture into the breadcrumb mixture until well combined.
5. Mix the fruit (diced figs) with the remaining flour and stir it into the batter. Pour the mixture into a pudding mold or casserole dish that has a tightly fitting top. Ensure the dish is large enough for the pudding to expand.
6. Steam the pudding for at least 3 hours. Turn off the heat source. Transfer the pudding out of the dish and place it in an oven preheated to about 180°C (350°F) for 5 minutes. Serve with your choice of sauce.
Difficulty: easy
Precision: measure ingredients
